description_long: This is a DeWalt cordless electric drill, predominantly yellow and black, with a robust plastic and metal construction. The drill features a pistol-grip handle with a textured surface for improved grip, and a large trigger button for operation. The front section houses a metallic chuck, currently fitted with a standard twist drill bit, and the body includes visible ventilation slots for cooling. The base of the handle is attached to a rectangular, removable lithium-ion battery pack, which is labeled with the DeWalt branding and voltage information. The drill's body displays several molded details, including a torque adjustment ring and a forward/reverse switch above the trigger. Brand logos and product information stickers are clearly visible on both sides of the tool.
description: A yellow and black DeWalt cordless electric drill with a visible battery pack, metallic chuck, and ergonomic grip, featuring clear branding and ventilation slots.
description_view_0: Side view showing the DeWalt logo, trigger, battery pack, and the full length of the drill with the chuck and bit visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle, battery pack, and the symmetrical design of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying product information stickers, ventilation slots, and the battery pack.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the metallic chuck with the attached twist drill bit and the top of the battery pack.
